hero.headline: Return To Your Origin
hero.sub: Rare sourced apparel for men seeking authenticity and purpose

story: Built for men who refuse to be ordinary.
This is not fashion. This is identity.

philosophy.headline: The Origin
philosophy.body: Primal Source was built from suffering. From the quiet moments when giving up felt easier than going on. We wear what we believe — that within every man is a primal source of strength waiting to be returned to.

email.headline: Join The Primal Circle
email.sub: First access to drops. No noise.
